title: The Professional
description: In this classic TV movie, Roark is a professional, a man who accepts assignments which are in some countries illegal.
altHero: aerial shot of Roark on a motel bed
alt1: Roark cleaning a gun on a hotel bed
alt2: Roark in a suit next to a brick wall
alt3: a dead man’s hand illuminated by a streetlight
alt4: Roark lays in bed holding a gun to his face
